" "St m<:f .m ~'IRT~I 1892 Gl/2013 (11 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PAK! 1-SFl. 1 I DEPARTMENT OF ATOMIC ENERGY NOTIFICATION Mumbai, the 30th April, 2013 Subject: 'Guidelines for implementation of arrangements for cooperation concerning peaceful uses of atomic energy with other countries' F. No.1/10/8/2009-ER .- In partial modification of the Resolution No.1/10/8/2009- ER dated 04.06.2010, the Government of India have decided that an officer not below the rank of Joint Secretary in the Department of Atomic Energy, Anushakti Bhavan, Chatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Marg, Mumbai-400 001 be designated as the competent authority for grant of authorization, including prescribing application fee under paragraph 8 thereof. The words 'An officer not below the rank of Joint Secretary' shall accordingly stand substituted for the words 'Additional Secretary' in the said paragraph. RAHUL KULSHRESHTH, Jt.
